title: Urgent mental health support
content: For urgent mental health help, NHS 111 has a mental health option (select the mental health option when calling 111), available 24/7 for people of all ages in a crisis. Local crisis lines and text services (for example, text SHOUT to 85258) also help. If someone life is at immediate risk, call 999 or go to A&E. GP appointments support non-urgent mental health needs.
